title: Citizens and Pirates Collide
description: Pages 16–19 focus on citizens and pirates collide, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as doflamingo's officers defend the palace and the factory while the allies split into fights across the trapped kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The plateau towards the Royal Palace-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Second Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If we capture the offi- CERS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Make sure to keep them confined!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: "Straw hat", I'm going to cut the wall open and make a path!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm going to beat the crap out of the bad guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And I'll climb right on up to the third floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait a sec... that's one too many!! Who the hell are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah!! Soldier- guy!! Great! I was looking for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: When the hell did you get on anyway ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I followed you through the road that Luffyland made.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Have you been stalking us or some- thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: acquaintance or not, we're over our weight capacity!! Get the hell off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're going to be meeting up with Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Rebecca's behind enemy lines?! Why didn't you stop her?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Are you even listening to me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She's wait- ing to meet up with us in the sunflower fields on the fourth flour!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: She's on the "capture" list as well!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: She's okay!! She's together with one of my Nakama.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: By the way, old man, why are you leaning forward against the very front like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: A cow would have had a bigger back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Listen & already!! My beloved horse farul can only run beautifully with two riders!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: No matter how the situation spins out... I have but one thing I want to do...!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Within the family's top officers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: There is a man that I want to kill with these hands... no matter what I must do....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: You're not planning on dying, right, old man?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid, I'm not planning on losing to this human body!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: In that case, good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Nothing is good about it!! Get the hell off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You're noisy. Why don't you get off?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: What the hell are you even talking about now?! This is the worst!! I guess this is to be expected from the worst generation!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Watch where you're going!!! Keep your eyes on the road, the road!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Keep pressing forward!! "Straw hat"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: We'll stop these guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: What's with these guys suddenly- Eeeee!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: They were fighting all over the place and unorganized until just now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: What?! What happened, you guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: gama- haha!! That's why I'm the "tactician"- game!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: This is "war"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: When the dark cloud rages, not one person shall reach the top!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: It is our duty to see you pass ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Let's make sure we send them on their way, Cavendish!!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Hey, hey!! I'm not some horse-drawn carriage for you to ride on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: We have to win this "war"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Now you've gone and done it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Aahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Daga- Maaaaaa ..!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: ...HRM?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Head for the top...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Biken ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Daruma -!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: ZAN EXUPERY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: What the hell?! let go of me, Danni!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: GAMA- Haha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: JET GATLLING ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Shit!! Those soldiers that were all over the place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: ...have started to come together !!!

summary: Citizens and Pirates Collide develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
